effects.effect: Apply Poison to a Vivosaur your Opponent Controls.

effects.name: Bone Return
effects.effect: If this card is Discarded: Place this card into your FP Zone, then you can Apply Poison to a Vivosaur your Opponent Controls.

effects.name: B-Plesio Venom
